asset.title: Ask Agent
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: An excellent walkthrough demonstrating the 'Ask Agent' feature. It clearly shows the end-to-end workflow of asking an agent to reconcile spreadsheet cells, with live updates and execution traces.

featureClarity.evidence: The video clearly demonstrates typing the `/ask` command to trigger the agent and shows the spreadsheet updating in real-time.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state with empty variance cells, the user command, the agent execution, and the final populated spreadsheet.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with well-structured panels for chat, spreadsheet, and execution trace.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom product ecosystem, combining chat, spreadsheets, and agent traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic capture of the UI showing real-time cell locking and value updates.

legibility.evidence: Most text is highly legible, though the trace log at the bottom is slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses financial reconciliation use cases, which is highly relevant to target users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly displays the agent's step-by-step trace and status changes without skipping steps.

observedEvidence: User typing `/ask reconcile q3 revenue` in chat
Agent status indicator showing execution steps
Spreadsheet cells updating with locked values
Trace log updating at the bottom of the screen

defects.observed: The trace log text at the bottom is quite small and may be difficult to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the font size of the trace log or zoom in on that area during the final frames.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's AI agent reconcile Q3 revenue variances directly inside the collaborative spreadsheet, complete with live execution traces.
